description: World #1 fluororesin fittings maker for semiconductor cleaning equipment (90%+ global share). Two segments: Electronic Equipment (67% of sales, PILAFLON fluororesin fittings/pumps/valves/tubing for semiconductor wet processes) and Industrial Equipment (33%, mechanical seals/gaskets/packing for petrochemical/power/automotive). Renamed from Nippon Pillar Packing in June 2024 at 100th anniversary. Super 300 (S-300) fitting standard is the de facto industry standard — Entegris licenses PILLAR fittings. Revenue FY2025/3: 58.0B JPY. Overseas sales ~30% direct, >60% including indirect exports via equipment makers. Acquired Tanken Seal Seiko (carbon seals) in Apr 2023 for 6.6B JPY. Malaysia subsidiary established Oct 2025.

partners: Entegris (ENTG) — licensing agreement: Entegris offers products with Super 300 Type Pillar fittings (valves, filters, manifolds, transducers)
_externalRelationships.notes: 100 years in seal technology (founded 1924). 90%+ world share in semiconductor cleaning equipment fittings. Super 300 (S-300) fitting is de facto industry standard — Entegris licensing confirms dominance. SCREEN is only customer crossing 10% revenue threshold (16.6% in FY2025, growing from 9% in FY2021). Global subsidiaries: PILLAR Taiwan (Kaohsiung factory), PILLAR Korea (Seoul), PILLAR Shanghai + Pillar Technology Chuzhou (manufacturing), PILLAR America (Fremont CA + Houston TX), new Malaysia subsidiary (Oct 2025). Electronic Equipment segment (67%) is pure-play semiconductor. Industrial Equipment (33%) provides diversification. Tanken Seal Seiko acquisition (2023) added carbon seal capabilities. 10-year revenue CAGR: 10.34%, net profit CAGR: 15.37%.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, Stock Analysis, MarketScreener, Kabutan, IRBank, Company IR, Entegris product catalog, Fisco analyst report
